string.text: No trade deal or certificate for {SETTLEMENT_NAME}. Buy prices are 5x, sell prices halved.
You already have a valid certificate for {TOWN_NAME}.
You need {PRICE} gold for a certificate here.
Certificate purchased for {TOWN_NAME}. Valid for 3 days.
Certificate purchased for {TOWN_NAME}. Valid for 1 week.
Certificate purchased for {TOWN_NAME}. Valid for 6 months.
Certificate purchased for {TOWN_NAME}. Valid for 1 year.
I'd like to purchase a trade certificate for this town.
Business is running smooth in {TOWN_NAME} — we do not really need new traders here. But if you insist, a year's certificate will cost you {PRICE} gold.
Trade in {TOWN_NAME} is steady. A full year's trading certificate will set you back {PRICE} gold. Interested?
Between you and me, {TOWN_NAME} has seen better days. We welcome new blood — a full year's certificate for just {PRICE} gold.
Yes, I'll take it.
Too expensive. Perhaps another time.
Excellent. One year of free trade. Safe travels.
I'd like to lease a trade permit for this town.
The markets here are thriving and we have no shortage of merchants. Securing a 6-month permit for {TOWN_NAME} will not be cheap — {PRICE} gold.
Business here in {TOWN_NAME} is fair — nothing special. A 6-month trading permit will cost you {PRICE} gold.
Honestly, {TOWN_NAME} could use more goods coming through. I will get you a 6-month permit for {PRICE} gold — help bring some life back to these stalls.
Alright, I'll take it.
That's too much. I'll look elsewhere.
Here you go. Six months only — come back if you need it renewed.
Can you arrange a short-term trade pass for this town?
Things are booming here in {TOWN_NAME}. A 3-day pass will not be cheap — {PRICE} gold, take it or leave it.
I can put in a word for you — three days of access in {TOWN_NAME} for {PRICE} gold. The usual arrangement.
Things are quiet in {TOWN_NAME} right now. I will get you a 3-day pass for {PRICE} gold — help bring some business around here.
Alright, let's do it.
Too much for three days. Maybe later.
Good. Three days — spend them wisely.
I need access to the markets here. Word is you can help with that...
Heh... sharp eyes. Maybe I can. Depends how persuasive you are. What are you offering?
[Smooth] A small bribe and a friendly word. 3-day pass, half price. ({CHANCE}% chance)
[Bold] Press harder for a 7-day pass, half price. ({CHANCE}% chance, Charm/Roguery 60+)
Never mind. I'll find another way.
Ha. You have a silver tongue, I will give you that. Consider it done — but do not push your luck.
Nice try. But words are cheap. Come back with something more convincing — or more coin.
I would like to discuss your prices...
I would like to work out a good deal with your village...
Hmm... Let us see what we can work out. What did you have in mind?
[Safe] A modest request, small discount, low risk. ({CHANCE}% chance{REP_TAG})
[Moderate] Push a bit harder. ({CHANCE}% chance, Trade 50+)
[Bold] Go for the big discount. ({CHANCE}% chance, Trade 100+)
Never mind, forget I asked.
Hmm, I cannot go that far. But I could manage {PCT}% off — take it or leave it.
Fair enough, I will take it.
Come now, surely you can do better than that.
No deal. I will shop elsewhere.
As you wish. Come back when you are willing to pay a fair price.
Very well, you drive a hard bargain. I will give you better prices today.
Ha! You think I am a fool? My prices stand — and I am adding a nuisance fee.
Haggle succeeded! Buy -{PCT}% / Sell +{PCT}%. (Rep: {REP}/50)
Haggle failed! Prices penalized for 3 days. (Rep: {REP}/50)
Counter accepted. Buy -{PCT}% / Sell +{PCT}%.
You pushed hard and won the full deal! Buy -{PCT}% / Sell +{PCT}%.
The deal collapsed! Locked out for 7 days. (Rep: {REP}/50)
I would like to trade with the village.
I am looking to hire some pack animal handlers.
Let me check on my caravan hands.
I have fine animals available. What are you after?
A sumpter horse handler. ({PRICE} gold, +{CAPACITY} capacity, {UPKEEP} gold/day)
A mule handler. ({PRICE} gold, +{CAPACITY} capacity, {UPKEEP} gold/day)
A camel handler. ({PRICE} gold, +{CAPACITY} capacity, {UPKEEP} gold/day)
Never mind.
Consider it done. They will follow your caravan.
You have {COUNT} handler(s): {ROSTER}. Upkeep: {UPKEEP} gold/day. Capacity bonus: +{CAPACITY}. Slot limit: {CURRENT}/{MAX} (party size {PARTY}/50). Who would you like to release?
Release a sumpter horse handler.
Release a mule handler.
Release a camel handler.
That will be all.
Understood. Paid and sent on their way.
Hired a {ANIMAL} handler. (+{CAPACITY} carry capacity, {UPKEEP} gold/day)
Dismissed the {ANIMAL} handler.
You could not afford upkeep — your {ANIMAL} handler has left.
You need at least 10 party members before you can manage caravan hands.
Your party can only manage {MAX} caravan hands right now. Grow your party to hire more.
You cannot have more than 5 caravan hands.
Your caravan is with you. ({COUNT} handler(s))
What are merchants talking about lately?
Nothing new since we last spoke. Give it a day or two and I may have something worth your coin.
Travelers talk... for {PRICE} gold I can tell you what I have heard about the markets nearby. Interested?
Here, {PRICE} gold. What have you heard?
Not today.
A trader came in just yesterday half-panicked — said {ITEM} is nearly impossible to find in {TOWN}. Someone is paying {PCT}% above the usual rate. If you can get some there, you will do very well.
Word from a merchant passing through — {ITEM} is fetching about {PCT}% above the going rate in {TOWN}. Demand has been strong. Worth a look if you have any to spare.
Nothing dramatic, but {ITEM} has been selling a little high in {TOWN} lately — around {PCT}% above normal. Might be worth stopping by.
Honestly, it has been quiet out there. No unusual prices that I have heard of. Sorry — keep the coin.
